## Clinical and safety impact

- Does this change priority, due timing, diagnosis matching, notification status, treatment scheduling, task creation, or graph completion?
- Could a malignant or unresolved case be hidden, downgraded, or falsely marked complete?
- Does deterministic logic remain authoritative?

## Checklist

- [ ] No patient information or credentials are included.
- [ ] Behavioral changes include regression coverage.
- [ ] Documentation reflects the new behavior.
- [ ] The project is not described as a validated medical device or autonomous clinical system.
